steps.t: The first cairn-marker may be found outside a barrow to the north of the Hall of Sanctuary. Lhudd instructed you to find the cairn-markers which denot…
The second cairn-marker may be found outside a barrow to the south of the Hall of Sanctuary. Lhudd instructed you to find the cairn-markers which deno…
The third cairn-marker may be found outside a barrow further to the south of the Hall of Sanctuary. Lhudd instructed you to find the cairn-markers whi…
Cadelhin is at Crug Cadelhin in the Lich Bluffs. Lhudd told you to bring news of Crug Fernvael's location to the shade Cadelhin.
